items.text: Evolved AI-based ecosystems and workflow automation developed by our customers or generic datasets enhanced by AI could compete more effectively with our products or solutions.
items.rationale: Introduces a specific new competitive threat: AI-based ecosystems and workflow automation developed by customers or using generic AI-enhanced datasets could outcompete the company's products, a risk not previously described.

items.text: Contracts with governments are also subject to a number of issues, such as shutdowns, funding changes, policy and other government concerns that may impact the terms or performance of a contract.
items.rationale: Adds specific new risk factors related to government contracts, including shutdowns, funding changes, and policy shifts that could affect contract terms or performance, which is a concrete and material risk not previously disclosed.
